testcase.name: test_admin_accounts_list
testcase.failure: tests/test_kyc_submit_hotfix.py:270: in test_admin_accounts_list assert response.status_code == 200, f"Accounts list failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Accounts list failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_transfers_queue
testcase.failure: tests/test_kyc_submit_hotfix.py:281: in test_admin_transfers_queue assert response.status_code == 200, f"Transfers queue failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Transfers queue failed: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code
